scope: Restore prototype-style Leads/Campaigns page tabs while keeping the normal app sidebar visible on both routes.
reason: Client clarified that Leads and Campaigns tabs must appear inside the page like the prototype, even though the same destinations are duplicated in the sidebar menu.

appLayout: Kept the M27 sidebar behavior unchanged for /leads and /campaigns.
The main app sidebar remains visible from the md breakpoint and auto-expanded on both routes.
leadsPage: Restored page-level tabs at the top of the prototype content shell.
Marked Leads as the active tab with aria-current=page.
Campaigns tab navigates to /campaigns via a React Router Link.
campaignsPage: Restored page-level tabs at the top of the prototype content shell.
Marked Campaigns as the active tab with aria-current=page.
Leads tab navigates to /leads via a React Router Link.
styles: Extended the existing .campaigns-prototype-tabs styling to support anchor elements as tabs while preserving the previous button styling.

validation.vscodeProblems: No errors in LeadsPage.tsx, CampaignsPage.tsx, globals.css, checklist, or evidence JSON after final Link tab implementation.
validation.build: npm run build passed after restoring page-level tabs and converting tab navigation to React Router Links.

notes: M28 supersedes the M27 note that removed page-level tabs. The sidebar fix remains intact; only the prototype tabs were restored.
